pclmbayes 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • How pclmbayes compares with the ungroup package
    • Bayesian density estimation and exact ungrouping with pclmbayes
  • Changelog

Package index

Package overview

pclmbayes pclmbayes-package
pclmbayes: Bayesian density estimation from grouped continuous data

Frequentist fit

print(<pclm>) summary(<pclm>) coef(<pclm>) fitted(<pclm>) logLik(<pclm>) plot(<pclm>) predict(<pclm>) quantile(<pclm>) pclm()
Frequentist penalised composite link model for grouped data
pclm_exact()
Constrained MAP fit: smoothest density that exactly preserves wide-bin counts

Bayesian fit

bpclm() print(<bpclm>) summary(<bpclm>) coef(<bpclm>) fitted(<bpclm>) plot(<bpclm>) predict(<bpclm>) quantile(<bpclm>)
Bayesian penalised composite link model for grouped data
posterior_predict() print(<pclm_posterior_predict>) summary(<pclm_posterior_predict>) plot(<pclm_posterior_predict>)
Posterior or parametric predictive distribution of fine-cell counts
calibrate()
Calibrate a fitted PCLM to preserve wide-bin totals exactly

Building blocks

bspline_basis()
Build an equally-spaced B-spline basis on a fine grid
bin_matrix()
Build the bin (composite-link) matrix C
diff_penalty()
Difference penalty matrix
latent_density()
Evaluate the latent density on the fine grid

Shape constraints

is_unimodal() is_logconcave() is_monotonic()
Shape predicates for discrete densities

Datasets

bloodlead
Lead concentration in the blood of New York children, 1974
tbdeaths1907
Tuberculosis deaths by age, The Netherlands, 1907

On this page

Developed by Chris Kypridemos.
